languages.text: Вас не покидает ощущение, что, пусть отродье и лишилось глаза, зияющая дыра смотрит прямо на вас с холодной неистребимой злобой.
Некрон теперь обречен на вечность в забвении и без возможности как-то взаимодействовать с внешним миром.

traits.locale_text: Некрон теперь обречен на вечность в забвении и без возможности как-то взаимодействовать с внешним миром.

languages.text: Even though the abominable creature has lost its eye, you cannot shake the feeling that the gaping wound still stares right at you with a cold, inextinguishable malice.
languages.original_text: Вас не покидает ощущение, что, пусть отродье и лишилось глаза, зияющая дыра смотрит прямо на вас с холодной неистребимой злобой.

traits.locale_text: Even though the abominable creature has lost its eye, you cannot shake the feeling that the gaping wound still emanates a cold, inextinguishable malice and stares right at you.
Even though the abominable creature has lost its eye, you cannot shake the feeling that the gaping wound still emanates a cold, inextinguishable malice and stares right at you.
Even though the abominable creature has lost its eye, you cannot shake the feeling that the gaping wound still stares right at you with a cold, inextinguishable malice.
Even though the abominable creature has lost its eye, you cannot shake the feeling that the gaping wound still stares right at you with a cold, inextinguishable malice.

languages.text: Obwohl die abscheuliche Kreatur ihr Auge verloren hat, wirst du das Gefühl nicht los, dass dich die klaffende Wunde noch immer mit einer kalten, grenzenlosen Bosheit anstarrt.
languages.original_text: Even though the abominable creature has lost its eye, you cannot shake the feeling that the gaping wound still stares right at you with a cold, inextinguishable malice.

traits.locale_text: Obwohl die abscheuliche Kreatur ihr Auge verloren hat, wirst du das Gefühl nicht los, dass dich die klaffende Wunde noch immer mit einer kalten, grenzenlosen Bosheit anstarrt.

languages.text: L'abominable créature a beau avoir perdu ses yeux, vous ne parvenez pas à vous défaire de l'idée que sa blessure béante vous observe d'un regard froid et malveillant.
languages.original_text: Even though the abominable creature has lost its eye, you cannot shake the feeling that the gaping wound still stares right at you with a cold, inextinguishable malice.

traits.locale_text: L'abominable créature a beau avoir perdu ses yeux, vous ne parvenez pas à vous défaire de l'idée que sa blessure béante vous observe d'un regard froid et malveillant.

languages.text: Aunque la abominable criatura ha perdido el ojo, sientes que la herida abierta te sigue observando con una maldad fría e inextinguible.
languages.original_text: Even though the abominable creature has lost its eye, you cannot shake the feeling that the gaping wound still stares right at you with a cold, inextinguishable malice.

traits.locale_text: Aunque la abominable criatura ha perdido el ojo, sientes que la herida abierta te sigue observando con una maldad fría e inextinguible.

languages.text: Menfur yaratık gözünü kaybetmiş olsa da açık yaranın hâlâ soğuk, sönmez bir kötülükle doğrudan sana baktığı hissinden kurtulamıyorsun.
languages.original_text: Even though the abominable creature has lost its eye, you cannot shake the feeling that the gaping wound still stares right at you with a cold, inextinguishable malice.

traits.locale_text: Menfur yaratık gözünü kaybetmiş olsa da açık yaranın hâlâ soğuk, sönmez bir kötülükle doğrudan sana baktığı hissinden kurtulamıyorsun.

languages.text: 尽管那可憎的怪物失去了一只眼睛，你却始终无法摆脱那种感觉，那道狰狞的伤口，仍以冰冷而不灭的恶意，直直地凝视着你。
languages.original_text: Even though the abominable creature has lost its eye, you cannot shake the feeling that the gaping wound still stares right at you with a cold, inextinguishable malice.

traits.locale_text: 尽管那可憎的怪物失去了一只眼睛，你却始终无法摆脱那种感觉，那道狰狞的伤口，仍以冰冷而不灭的恶意，直直地凝视着你。

languages.text: その恐ろしい生き物は、目を失っている。しかし、その開いた傷口は、冷酷で消えない悪意を、今もなお、あなたを見つめている。
languages.original_text: Even though the abominable creature has lost its eye, you cannot shake the feeling that the gaping wound still stares right at you with a cold, inextinguishable malice.

traits.locale_text: その恐ろしい生き物は、目を失っている。しかし、その開いた傷口は、冷酷で消えない悪意を、今もなお、あなたを見つめている。
